sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state after SPACE
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print("Player state:")
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'N']:
        print(f"  {n['color']}: pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

print("\nCharcoal frames:")
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] == 12:
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}")

print("\nBlue squares:")
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 4:
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Count blue squares
blue_count = sum(1 for n in seg if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 4)
print(f"\nBlue square count: {blue_count}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
